signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate for March 2026 rose to 2.2% from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4% as reported by Trading Economics on or around early April 2026.[1] A secondary source reports a precise figure of 2.16% year-over-year, with a 0

signals.headline: Morgan Stanley spot BTC ETF posts record inflows on launch day | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Morgan Stanley spot BTC ETF posts record inflows on launch day | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This breaking confirmation of institutional commitment via the strongest first-day performance for any Morgan Stanley fund directly bolsters Bitcoin's safe-haven narrative amid $71K price stability and 57% dominance, likely shifting prediction market odds higher for near-term targets like $75K-$80K[4][7].

signals.headline: Hong Kong grants first stablecoin licenses | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Hong Kong grants first stablecoin licenses | YES | MED confidence**  
Opening regulated crypto access across Asia, this regulatory greenlight enhances Solana's ecosystem momentum (with SOL at $82+ and ETF assets over $1B), potentially driving altcoin sentiment and prediction markets for SOL upside to $100-$110[2][4].
